title: WHITE TEXT on DARK COLORS, DARK TEXT on LIGHT COLORS
excerpt: For color centric things like Statuses and Calendar View, Dark Text on Dark Colors and vice versa make it impossible to see what’s written there.

posts.author: coldbrewboba (Jason Luckett)
posts.cookedHtml: For color centric things like Statuses and Calendar View, Dark Text on Dark Colors and vice versa make it impossible to see what’s written there.
